source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the power amplifier circuit shown in figure, with \( U_{CES} = 0V \), \( V_{CC} = 8V \), \( V_A = 1V \), and \( R_L = 8Ω \), when the input signal is a sine wave \( U_i = 5.5V \), the waveform across the load \( R_L \)
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Exhibits clipping distortion at the top
